name: equip_leather_armor
description: Equip the leather tunic chestplate for protection
parameters: z.object({ itemName: z.string().describe("The name of the armor item to equip, e.g., 'leather_chestplate'"), destination: z.enum(["head", "torso", "legs", "feet", "off-hand", "hand"]).describe("The equipment slot to use") })
